units.source_text: – 「穩健」：有充裕能⼒履⾏財務承諾、違責或然率極微或甚低及／或預期虧損⽔平甚低的風險項⽬。
units.translation_target_text: – “Stable”: Risk projects that have sufficient ability to fulfill financial commitments, have a minimal or very low probability of default, and/or have very low expected loss levels.
units.translation_en: – “Stable”: Risk projects that have sufficient ability to fulfill financial commitments, have a minimal or very low probability of default, and/or have very low expected loss levels.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: – “Stable”: Risk projects that have sufficient ability to fulfill financial commitments, have a minimal or very low probability of default, and/or have very low expected loss levels.

units.source_text: – 「良好」：需要較密切監察、履⾏財務承諾的能⼒良好、違責風險低的風險項⽬。
units.translation_target_text: – “Good”: Risk projects that require closer monitoring, have good ability to fulfill financial commitments, and have low default risk.
units.translation_en: – “Good”: Risk projects that require closer monitoring, have good ability to fulfill financial commitments, and have low default risk.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: – “Good”: Risk projects that require closer monitoring, have good ability to fulfill financial commitments, and have low default risk.

units.source_text: – 「滿意」：需要較密切監察、履⾏財務承諾的能⼒尚可⾄⼀般、違責風險中等的風險項⽬。
units.translation_target_text: – “Satisfactory”: risk projects that require closer monitoring, have average to average ability to fulfill financial commitments, and have medium default risk.
units.translation_en: – “Satisfactory”: risk projects that require closer monitoring, have average to average ability to fulfill financial commitments, and have medium default risk.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: – “Satisfactory”: risk projects that require closer monitoring, have average to average ability to fulfill financial commitments, and have medium default risk.

units.source_text: – 「低於標準」：需要不同程度的特別監察及違責風險較令⼈關注的風險項⽬。
units.translation_target_text: – “Below standard”: risk items that require varying degrees of special monitoring and where default risk is of greater concern.
units.translation_en: – “Below standard”: risk items that require varying degrees of special monitoring and where default risk is of greater concern.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: – “Below standard”: risk items that require varying degrees of special monitoring and where default risk is of greater concern.

units.source_text: – 「信貸已減值」：已按財務報表附註1.2(j)所述⽅式進⾏評估的風險項⽬。
units.translation_target_text: – ‘Credit Impaired’: Risk items that have been assessed in the manner described in note 1.2(j) to the financial statements.
units.translation_en: – ‘Credit Impaired’: Risk items that have been assessed in the manner described in note 1.2(j) to the financial statements.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: – ‘Credit Impaired’: Risk items that have been assessed in the manner described in note 1.2(j) to the financial statements.
